title: taraxacum ciliare
intro: Taraxacum ciliare, also known as the long-stalked dandelion or silky dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections and reduce inflammation in the body. Taraxacum ciliare is also valued for its potential health benefits, such as supporting liver and kidney function, and its antioxidant properties may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
